mapper.select: SELECT c.blacklist_report_comment_seq AS boardCommentSeq, c.blacklist_report_seq AS boardSeq, c.parent_blacklist_report_comment_seq AS parentBoardCommentSeq, c.writer_member_seq AS writerMemberSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writerName, wm.member_id AS writerMemberId, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writerProfileImageUrl, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN #{blindCommentMaskedContent} ELSE c.content END AS content, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_1 END AS emoticonSeq1, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_2 END AS emoticonSeq2, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE c.emoticon_seq_3 END AS emoticonSeq3, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me1.image_url END AS emoticonImageUrl1, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me2.image_url END AS emoticonImageUrl2, CASE WHEN IFNULL(c.report_count, 0) >= #{blindReportThreshold} THEN NULL ELSE me3.image_url END AS emoticonImageUrl3, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.dislike_count AS dislikeCount, c.report_count AS reportCount, (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blacklist_report_comment r WHERE r.parent_blacklist_report_comment_seq = c.blacklist_report_comment_seq AND r.show_yn = 'Y') AS replyCount, (SELECT v.vote_type FROM blacklist_report_comment_vote v WHERE v.blacklist_report_comment_seq = c.blacklist_report_comment_seq AND v.member_seq = #{currentMemberSeq} LIMIT 1) AS myVoteType, DATE_FORMAT(c.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM blacklist_report_comment c LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = c.writer_member_seq LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me1 ON me1.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_1 AND me1.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me2 ON me2.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_2 AND me2.use_yn = 'Y' LEFT JOIN member_emoticon me3 ON me3.member_emoticon_seq = c.emoticon_seq_3 AND me3.use_yn = 'Y' WHERE c.blacklist_report_seq = #{blacklistReportSeq} AND c.show_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY c.create_dt ASC

SELECT c.blacklist_report_comment_seq AS boardCommentSeq, c.blacklist_report_seq AS boardSeq, c.parent_blacklist_report_comment_seq AS parentBoardCommentSeq, c.writer_member_seq AS writerMemberSeq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(c.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writerName, c.content AS content, c.emoticon_seq_1 AS emoticonSeq1, c.emoticon_seq_2 AS emoticonSeq2, c.emoticon_seq_3 AS emoticonSeq3, c.like_count AS likeCount, c.dislike_count AS dislikeCount, c.report_count AS reportCount, DATE_FORMAT(c.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createDt FROM blacklist_report_comment c LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = c.writer_member_seq WHERE c.blacklist_report_comment_seq = #{blacklistReportCommentSeq} AND c.show_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO blacklist_report_comment ( blacklist_report_seq, parent_blacklist_report_comment_seq, writer_member_seq, writer_name, content, emoticon_seq_1, emoticon_seq_2, emoticon_seq_3, like_count, dislike_count, report_count, show_yn, create_dt, create_id, create_ip ) VALUES ( #{boardSeq}, #{parentBoardCommentSeq}, #{writerMemberSeq}, #{writerName}, #{content}, #{emoticonSeq1}, #{emoticonSeq2}, #{emoticonSeq3}, 0, 0, 0, 'Y', NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp} )
INSERT INTO blacklist_report_comment_vote (blacklist_report_comment_seq, member_seq, vote_type) VALUES (#{blacklistReportCommentSeq}, #{memberSeq}, #{voteType})
INSERT IGNORE INTO blacklist_report_comment_report (blacklist_report_comment_seq, member_seq) VALUES (#{blacklistReportCommentSeq}, #{memberSeq})
